expected_text: Shepard, if we're going in, let me check the shielding first. I'd rather not get us both electrocuted.
transcribed_text: "'Shepherd, if we're going in, let me check the shielding first. "'I'd rather not get us both electrocuted.'

expected_text: Keelah, this place is falling apart. Give me a minute and I can probably make it fail in our favor.
transcribed_text: Keala, this place is falling apart. Give me a minute and I can probably make it fail in our favor.

expected_text: I know what it's like to lose your home, Shepard. That's why I won't let this happen again.
transcribed_text: I know what it's like to lose your home, Shepard. That's why I won't let this happen again.

expected_text: The geth are adapting faster than we expected, but so am I. Just keep them busy for a few more seconds.
transcribed_text: The Geth are adapting faster than we expected, but so am I. Just keep them busy for a few more seconds.

expected_text: When this is over, come find me in engineering. I think we've both earned one quiet conversation.
transcribed_text: When this is over, come find me in engineering. I think we've both earned one quiet conversation.

expected_text: Shepard, give me a second. I almost have this system working the way I want it.
transcribed_text: Shepard, give me a second. I almost have this system working the way I want it.

expected_text: After everything we've been through, one calm evening on the Normandy doesn't seem like too much to ask.
transcribed_text: after everything we've been through one calm evening on the normandy doesn't seem like too much to ask

expected_text: I know that look. You're about to do something reckless, and I'm definitely coming with you.
transcribed_text: I know that look. You're about to do something reckless, and I'm definitely coming with you.

expected_text: If the Normandy is going to keep flying, someone has to stay down here and fix what everyone else breaks.
transcribed_text: If the Normandy is going to keep flying, someone has to stay down here and fix what everyone else breaks.

expected_text: I used to imagine what it would feel like to stand somewhere and call it home. It still feels strange.
transcribed_text: I used to imagine what it would feel like to stand somewhere and call it home. It still feels strange.

expected_text: You were right to come talk to me. I just needed a little more time to think.
transcribed_text: You were right to come talk to me. I just needed a little more time to think.

expected_text: I've spent my whole life learning how to survive in failing systems. This one doesn't scare me.
transcribed_text: I've spent my whole life learning how to survive in failing systems. This one doesn't scare me.

expected_text: Sometimes I forget how quiet engineering gets when it's just me and the sound of the drive core.
transcribed_text: Sometimes I forget how quiet engineering gets when it's just me and the sound of the drive core.

expected_text: I trust you, Shepard. More than I probably should, but I'm done pretending otherwise.
transcribed_text: I trust you, Shepard, more than I probably should, but I'm done pretending otherwise.

expected_text: Let me run one more diagnostic. If something goes wrong out there, I'd rather be ready for it.
transcribed_text: "'Let me run one more diagnostic. If something goes wrong out there, I'd rather be ready for it.'

expected_text: Shepard, if you stay down here much longer, I'm going to start thinking you came to engineering just to see me.
transcribed_text: Shepard, if you stay down here much longer, I'm going to start thinking you came to engineering just to see me.

expected_text: After all this, I think we deserve one quiet night, no armor, no alarms, and no one asking us to save the galaxy.
transcribed_text: After all this, I think we deserve one quiet night. No armor, no alarms, and no one asking us to save the galaxy.

expected_text: I used to tell myself I was only here to help the mission. Then you smiled at me, and that became a lot harder to believe.
transcribed_text: I used to tell myself I was only here to help the mission then you smiled at me and that became a lot harder to believe

expected_text: When this is over, I don't want another emergency, another report, or another alarm. I just want a little time alone with you.
transcribed_text: When this is over, I don't want another emergency, another report, or another alarm. I just want a little time alone with you.

expected_text: You make me feel safe, Shepard. That still surprises me, even after everything we've been through together.
transcribed_text: You make me feel safe, Shepard. That still surprises me, even after everything we've been through together.

expected_text: I know my immune system, my suit, and half the galaxy all have opinions about this. I only care about mine.
transcribed_text: I know my immune system. My suit and half the galaxy all have opinions about this. I only care about mine.

expected_text: Every time you walk into engineering, I forget what I was supposed to be working on. That's becoming a problem.
transcribed_text: "'Every time you walk into engineering, I forget what I was supposed to be working on. That's becoming a problem.'

expected_text: I spent years imagining what home might feel like. Now I think it might just be wherever you are.
transcribed_text: I spent years imagining what home might feel like. Now, I think it might just be wherever you are.

expected_text: Don't look at me like that, Shepard. I'm trying very hard to sound calm and completely failing.
transcribed_text: Don't look at me like that, Shepard. I'm trying very hard to sound calm and completely failing.

expected_text: If you asked me to stay, I would. Not because of duty. Because I'd want to be with you.
transcribed_text: if you asked me to stay I would not because of duty because I'd want to be with you
